title: Sweet Velvety Portuguese Vine Leaves Stir-fry
description: This air-fried sweet and velvety Portuguese vine leaves dish is a romantic twist on the traditional recipe, perfect for dessert or as a light snack.

ingredients.name: unsweetened cocoa powder
ingredients.notes: optional, for texture and depth of flavor

instructions: Preheat your air fryer to 350°F (175°C). Rinse the vine leaves and remove any stems or tough parts.

In a small saucepan, combine pumpkin puree, maple syrup, cocoa powder, coconut milk, and lime juice. Bring to a simmer over medium heat, stirring occasionally until well combined and slightly thickened.
Carefully place the air-fried vine leaves in an even layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Pour the mixture evenly over them, ensuring they are fully coated.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until the vine leaves are hot and golden brown. Remove from oven, let cool slightly before serving.
